haiku45.summary_excerpt: TypeScript code is well-structured with proper types and error handling, but the deliverable is critically incomplete. Missing: (1) all test files—bun test step exists but no .test.ts files provided; (2) test harness required by task (must call act push per test case, capture to act-result.txt, validate exit codes & exact output); (3) fixture files referenced in workflow (fixtures/files.json, rules.json); (4) act-result.txt generation—required artifact never created; (5) no evidence TDD methodol

gemini31pro.summary_excerpt: Clean, modular TypeScript code with excellent error handling. The workflow is functional but misses a few GitHub Actions best practices: it uses unpinned action refs (checkout@v4) and installs Bun via curl script rather than the official setup-bun action.
